statements.speaker: Trump
statements.quote: We have reached a fair, responsible budget framework — the Democrats finally agreed to common-sense priorities.
statements.context: On the tentative FY2027 budget framework agreement

statements.speaker: Schumer
statements.quote: Senate Democrats held the line on protecting Medicaid expansion and rental assistance for working families.

statements.speaker: Zelensky
statements.quote: Our forces are holding under heavy pressure. The next ammunition deliveries from our partners cannot come soon enough.
statements.sourceOutlet: Office of the President of Ukraine

statements.speaker: Putin
statements.quote: The special military operation continues to advance on schedule. Our objectives remain unchanged.

statements.speaker: Xi Jinping
statements.quote: ASEAN partners and China share an interest in defending open, rules-based trade against unilateral tariff measures.
statements.context: At a Beijing trade forum, indirectly responding to US tariffs

statements.speaker: Powell
statements.quote: The committee remains data-dependent. We will not pre-commit to a path for the policy rate.
statements.context: Press conference following the May FOMC meeting
